executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed with HTTP 500 Internal Server Error. The GitHub Actions workflow could not be triggered due to API-level failures. This is not a Maven build error but rather an infrastructure/configuration issue preventing the build from starting.

errors.error_message: HTTP Error 500: Internal Server Error. Failed to run workflow dispatch
errors.root_cause: GitHub Actions API returned 500 error when attempting to dispatch the build.yml workflow. This indicates either: 1) GitHub API service degradation, 2) Invalid workflow configuration, 3) Missing or incorrect workflow file path, 4) Insufficient permissions or authentication issues.
errors.impact: Build cannot be initiated. All downstream build processes are blocked.

recommended_fixes.automated_action: Use GitHub Script Reader to check if .github/workflows/build.yml exists in repository
manual_steps: Verify file has correct YAML syntax
Ensure workflow has workflow_dispatch trigger configured

recommended_fixes.description: Verify GitHub Actions is enabled for repository
recommended_fixes.automated_action: Check repository settings via GitHub API
manual_steps: Go to repository Settings > Actions > General
Ensure Actions permissions are set to 'Allow all actions'
Verify workflow permissions are set to 'Read and write permissions'
Check if Actions are enabled for the repository

recommended_fixes.description: Verify GitHub token has correct permissions
recommended_fixes.automated_action: Test token permissions via GitHub API
manual_steps: Check if GitHub token has 'actions:write' scope
Regenerate token if necessary with correct scopes
Update token in environment variables or secrets

recommended_fixes.description: Retry workflow dispatch after delay (GitHub API may be experiencing temporary issues)
manual_steps: Check GitHub Status page for any ongoing incidents

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Workflow dispatch failure logged at attempt 2. No build artifacts generated. No code changes deployed.
compliance_notes.security_impact: No security impact. Build pipeline blocked before execution.
compliance_notes.regulatory_compliance: No compliance violations. Build process did not execute.

blocking_issues: Workflow dispatch API failure prevents build initiation
next_steps: Verify workflow file exists and is correctly configured
Check GitHub Actions permissions and settings
Validate authentication token has required scopes
Monitor GitHub Status for API issues
